html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

Moon Cake is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It cannot be eaten by Wigfrid.

By TypeBy Crock Pot Value
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Moon Cake
""It's "blue" flavored!""
Food Info
19
60
8
Goodies
Object Info
15
40
Crafting
×5
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotr_food2"
“Blue is the most scientific flavor.”
–Wilson
“It sure tastes... blue?”
–Willow
“Ah. Wolfgang expected cheese.”
–Wolfgang
“Now my lips have turned blue...”
–Wendy
“THE MOON IS DELICIOUS”
–WX-78
“"Blue" is an odd adjective for a flavor, but I can't disagree.”
–Wickerbottom
“Whew. It's not givin' me the transformation tingles.”
–Woodie
“What a mysterious flavor.”
–Maxwell
“I dö nöt trust whatever lies within.”
–Wigfrid
“Mmm, the moon is tasty!”
–Webber
“A part of me expected it to be cheesecake.”
–Warly
“Mmmmm...”
–Wormwood
“Can't quite pin down the flavor, but I like it!”
–Winona
“Once in a blue moon I'll sample mortal food... but not today, hyuyu.”
–Wortox
“Yummy!”
–Wurt
“Is that what the moon tastes like?”
–Walter
“I'd nearly forgotten what "blue" tasted like.”
–Wanda
Moon Cake is a Food Item that can be obtained at a Bunnyman Shrine for 5 Lucky Gold Nuggets. It cannot be eaten by Wigfrid.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bánh Trung Thu là một Vật Phẩm Thực Phẩm có thể kiếm được tại Đền Bunnyman với giá 5 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn. Wigfrid không thể ăn nó.
